stemHtml: Complete the definition: An instrument approach procedure consists of predetermined manoeuvres using flight instruments with obstacle protection from the (1) _____, or where applicable from the (2) _____, to a point allowing (3) _____.

options.b: (1) Initial Approach Fix; (2) Beginning; (3) Missed Approach
options.d: (1) Final Approach Fix; (2) Beginning; (3) Missed Approach
